changes_made: Compressed SKILL.md from 189 lines (verbose) to ~70 lines (targeted)
Replaced pandas-based code pattern with stdlib-only (csv+json) complete script template
Simplified conversion factors to use multiply-only (×18.018 instead of ÷0.0555)
Added explicit quality report output format specification

Fixed task definition bug: testPattern values in lab-quality-report/task.ts referenced describe() block names instead of individual testcase names, causing all criteria to score 0 regardless of output quality
bugs_found: lab-quality-report task.ts testPattern values ('output exists', 'excluded rows', etc.) did not match JUnit XML testcase names ('quality_report.json exists', 'excluded_rows is 3', etc.) because bun's JUnit reporter uses describe-block names as classname attribute, not name attribute
